scripts.dev: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const cp=require('child_process'); const path=require('path'); const root=path.resolve(process.cwd(),'../..'); const store=path.join(root,'node_modules','.pnpm'); const find=(name)=>{ const dir=fs.readdirSync(store).find(x => x.startsWith(name+'@')); if(!dir) throw new Error(name+' package not found under root .pnpm store'); return path.join(store,dir,'node_modules'); }; const cli=path.join(find('tsx'),'tsx','dist','cli.mjs'); const extra=process.argv.slice(1); if(extra[0]==='--') extra.shift(); const nodePath=[find('tsx'),find('zod'),find('mqtt'),find('pg')].join(path.delimiter); const env={...process.env, NODE_PATH: process.env.NODE_PATH ? (process.env.NODE_PATH + path.delimiter + nodePath) : nodePath}; const r=cp.spawnSync(process.execPath,[cli,'src/main.ts',...extra],{stdio:'inherit',env}); process.exit(r.status == null ? 1 : r.status);"
scripts.once: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const cp=require('child_process'); const path=require('path'); const root=path.resolve(process.cwd(),'../..'); const store=path.join(root,'node_modules','.pnpm'); const find=(name)=>{ const dir=fs.readdirSync(store).find(x => x.startsWith(name+'@')); if(!dir) throw new Error(name+' package not found under root .pnpm store'); return path.join(store,dir,'node_modules'); }; const cli=path.join(find('tsx'),'tsx','dist','cli.mjs'); const extra=process.argv.slice(1); if(extra[0]==='--') extra.shift(); const nodePath=[find('tsx'),find('zod'),find('mqtt'),find('pg')].join(path.delimiter); const env={...process.env, NODE_PATH: process.env.NODE_PATH ? (process.env.NODE_PATH + path.delimiter + nodePath) : nodePath}; const r=cp.spawnSync(process.execPath,[cli,'src/main.ts','--once',...extra],{stdio:'inherit',env}); process.exit(r.status == null ? 1 : r.status);"
